chat.help-1.heading: ʻOku Talitali Lelei Koe ki he FamilySearch Chat!
chat.help-1.message: ʻOku ʻai ʻa e meʻangāue ki he talanoá ke fengāueʻaki mo aʻu atu ki he kakai kehé ʻi he FamilySearch.  ʻE lava pē ke fakamoʻui pe tamateʻi ʻi he setting hoʻo ʻakauní.
chat.help-1a.message: Tuku ke tau vakai ki ha niʻihi ʻo hono ngaahi kongokonga mahuʻinga tahá.
chat.help-2.heading: ʻAve Fakavavevave ha Pōpoaki
chat.help-2.message: Ke kamata ha pōpoaki, lomiʻi ʻi ha ID Fetuʻutaki ʻo ha tokotaha kau maí.  ʻOku tuʻu ʻa e ʻū ID Fetuʻutakí ʻi he Chat directory pe ʻi ha feituʻu pē kuo tānaki atu ai ʻe ha taha ha fakamatala.
chat.help-3.heading: Toe faingofua ange ʻa e fengāueʻakí
chat.help-3.message: Te ke lava ʻo ʻave ho pōpoakí ʻo aʻu ki he kakai ʻe toko {num}.
chat.help-3a.message: ʻOku hanga ʻe hono fakahū ʻo ha Tree ID ʻo ha kui ki he fepōtalanoaʻakí, ʻo faʻu ha fehokotakiʻanga fakahangatonu ki heʻenau peesi fakamatala fakafoʻituituí.
chat.help-4.heading: Tokangaʻi ho workspace
chat.help-4.message: ʻOku feʻunga ʻa e window talanoa ʻi he pēsí pea ʻe lava ke hiki pe toe fakalahi koeʻuhí ke ʻoua naʻa fakaʻefiʻefi.
chat.help-4a.message: ʻOku ʻuhinga ʻeni ke ke lava pē ʻo ʻave mo maʻu ha ngaahi pōpoaki kae ʻikai mole ai ho tuʻuʻanga ʻi he uepisaiti FamilySearch.
chat.help-5.heading: Tokangaʻi hoʻo ngaahi fepōtalanoaʻakí
chat.help-5.message: Lomiʻi ʻi he meʻa ke fili mei ai ʻi ʻolunga he window chat ke taʻofi ha fepōtalanoaʻaki, taʻofi ha tokotaha ʻoku ʻaʻana, pe lipooti ko e ngaohikovia.
chat.help-5a.message: Fakaʻosí, ʻoku ʻi ai ha meʻa ke fetongi’aki hoʻo ʻakauní ke fakakau ai hoʻo fakamatala fakafoʻituituí ʻi he ngaahi ola ʻo e fekumi ʻi he tohi tuʻasilá. Kapau he ʻikai ke ke lava ʻo maʻu ha kaungāmeʻa pe mēmipa ʻo e fāmilí ʻi he Fepōtalanoaʻakí, mahalo pē koeʻuhí kuo nau liliu ke mate ʻa e foungá ni.
chat.help-5b.message: <0>Ako lahi ange<0/> fekauʻaki mo e Fetalanoaʻakí ʻi he FamilySearch blog.
